name: Sentient
summary: The Sentients are adaptive high-threat enemies associated with unusual resistances and advanced combat behaviors.
description: Hostile faction known for adaptation, unusual resistances, and high-end encounter pressure.

recommendedStatusPlan: Avoid relying on one repeating damage profile when adaptation behavior is in play.
Burst windows and varied damage sources are safer than slow single-note ramps.
cautions: Adaptation-style pressure can punish repetitive elemental planning.
Sentient encounters often demand mobility and target switching, not just DPS.

notes: Sentient guidance should remain high-level until adaptation specifics are sourced more deeply.
